title: cyphostemma tsaratananensis
intro: Cyphostemma tsaratananensis, also known as the Madagascar Copper Vine, is a species of flowering plant in the grape family, Vitaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Madagascar for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyphostemma tsaratananensis include treating fever, rheumatism, and various skin conditions, as well as having antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
